raw_text: >isabel granados rubio a proactive, out-going, and good team player aerospace engineer. exceptional written and oral communication abilities aided by a strong attention to detail. these allow me to express and share my ideas clearly. great interpersonal skills, which allow me to learn and share experiences. excellent listener and understanding person allowing me to appreciate different points of view as well as learning new things. responsible and organized, what makes me capable to lead teams of successful work. considerable technical knowledge in the aerospace field supported by a masters degree. cmt motores térmicos - researcher internship. sep. 2013 july 2014 in this r&d environment, was responsible for: programming in matlab-simulink the flight envelope, stall and structural limitations of a320. develop news air routes that enables the plane to save fuel. energy optimization of a-320 by the method of dynamic programming working in a transnational and multilingual team. upv - aircraft department internship. spt. 2012 jun 2013 working in this university environment my responsibilities included: lead and manage the working group to accomplish the preliminary design of an aircraft and built its 3d model, assigning the tasks of each member. design the interior of the passengers cabin with catia v5. drawing aerodynamic surface of the aircraft fuselage with wireframe and surface design workbench in catia v5. upm aerodynamic department internship. spt. 2012 july 2012 working in this university environment my responsibilities included: running tests with airfoils in the upm-euita aerodynamic tunnel. study of the influence of manufacturing defects in the aerodynamics of the naca 63015 airfoil. aerodynamic study of naca 63015 airfoil and its possible manufacturing defects using finite element method software ansys 13 fluent. currículo: isabel granados rubio universidad politécnica de valencia (upv). sept. 2012 jul. 2014 aerospace engineering master's degree. universidad politécnica de madrid (upm). sept. 2008 july 2011 > aerospace engineering bachelor's degree. nuestra seora del pilar college, madrid. sept 2006 june 2008 > international baccalaureate. juan xxiii school, madrid sept 2001 june 2006 > gsce new researches & developments in composite materials upm. july 2010 european driving license b. apr. 2010 software expertise: ansys, autodesk inventor, autocad, catia, gasturb, mathematica, matlab, microsoft office & programming in visual basic, patran-nastram, simulink. software certificates: 60 hours course in patran-nastram upm. june 201 60 hours course in ansys-fluent upm sept 201 120 hours course in catia upm. june 201 spanish: mother tongue. english: fluent. c1 level. french: intermediate. a2 level italy: basic. al level. in my gsce was finalist in my home province in the school contest energy and society that organized the nuclear forum of spain. during my baccalaureate take a leading role in the nuestra seora del pilar science team, we presented two consecutive years to the science fair in madrid "madrid es ciencia". in these day have been involved in volunteering jobs for the community with a charity organization called age uk. finally, keep a good level of fitness doing a variety of activities such as running, swimming, and skiing. also enjoy reading on different subjects, both academically and on a personal level. moreover, being a passionate of history, photography and traveling, love visiting historical places together with my camera in my spare time.
